name: hbrefactor
description: Refatoração verificada para Harbour: rename, reorder, extract e usages via CLI hbrefactor (oráculo do compilador -x).

commands.title: hbrefactor: Reorder parameters of function under cursor
hbrefactor: Extract selection to new function

hbrefactor.hbBin.description: Diretório dos binários do Harbour com suporte a -x (vira HB_BIN). Ex.: ~/devel/harbour-core/harbour/bin/linux/gcc

hbrefactor.project.description: Caminho do .hbp do projeto. Vazio: procura *.hbp no workspace (pergunta se houver mais de um).
